features.name: 3 Group Bonuses + Global Bumper Boost
features.description: Implements three completion groups (T1 targets, T2 targets, and 3 lanes), group bonus collection through troughs, flashing bonus arrows when active, base scoring of 1 on scoring switches, and bumper boost to 5 points when all three groups are active.
features.goal: Create lane/target progression with collectible bonuses and a temporary global bumper scoring multiplier condition.
